GetFitAI

About GetFitAI

Making personalized fitness accessible to everyone through the power of AI.

Our Story

GetFitAI was born from a simple frustration: fitness planning should not be complicated.

As busy professionals, we found ourselves spending more time researching workouts than actually doing them. Personal trainers were expensive, generic plans did not fit our schedules, and most apps required endless registrations before showing any value.

So we built GetFitAI — a tool that generates personalized workout plans in seconds, with zero friction. No sign-up. No downloads. Just open your browser and get a plan tailored to your goals, experience, and available equipment.

Our Values

Simplicity

Fitness should be simple. We remove friction so you can focus on what matters: training.

Personalization

Every body is different. Our AI creates plans tailored to your unique situation and goals.

Accessibility

Fitness is for everyone. No expensive equipment, no gym membership, no barriers.

Built With
